title: FolderBot Session State
description: Authoritative machine state for a FolderBot session. Written by the agent/flows; read by all components.

locked.description: Write-safety flag. Set true before any critical write; release immediately after. Prevents concurrent writes via connector.

active_files.description: Session-relative paths of files currently being worked on.

last_job_id.description: ID of the most recently created job. Plugin only; null in Core.

last_run.description: Summary of the most recent job execution. Plugin only.
